name: Barley-Mushroom Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10-3/4 oz. can cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Cook barley according to package directions; drain.
3. Mix in soup and half the onions.
4. Pour into a 9-inch casserole dish and top with remaining onions.
5. Bake for 25 minutes. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
Recipe from "Enjoy, Enjoy, Enjoy. With Love From Carol" by Carol Esgar. Formatted by Lynn Thomas dcqp82a@prodigy.com. Source: New York Daily News 1-22-97.
